chapter_title.ar: بَابُ عَرْضِ الْأَعْمَالِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The deeds are presented to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/6)
text: هُ ذَكَرَ هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ فَسَيَرَى اللَّهُ عَمَلَكُمْ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ قَالَ هُوَ وَ اللَّهِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abu Abdullah Al Sammat, from Yahya Bin Masawir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws. This Verse was mentioned [9:105] And say: Work; so Allah will See your work and (so will) His Rasool and the Believers. Heasws said: ‘Heasws, by Allahazwj, is Aliasws Bin Abu Talibasws’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Mahran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from abu ‘Abdallah al-Samit from Yahya ibn Musawwir who has said the following. He mentioned this verse to abu Ja‘far (a.s.), “Act as you wish. God will see your deeds and so will do His Messenger and the believers. . .” [9:106] The Imams (a.s.) then said, “I swear by Allah that he (the believer) is Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.).”
